_doc: Home Assistant Plant Monitor configurations per bed. Thresholds are the most restrictive across all crops in each bed.

plants.name: Havn Bed A - Family Bed

notes.min_moisture_from: cucumber-mini-munch (45% south zone) / broccoli (40% middle zone) -- using 40% as bed-wide minimum
notes.max_moisture_from: thyme (55% -- lowest max among bed crops in middle zone)
notes.min_temperature_from: cucumber-mini-munch (4C -- highest frost threshold, tied with basil and pepper). Using 0C as bed-wide alert since north zone has hardy raspberries.

plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed A
plant:
  havn_bed_a:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_a_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_a_temperature
    min_moisture: 40
    max_moisture: 55
    min_temperature: 0

plants.name: Havn Bed B - His Bed

notes.min_moisture_from: pea-shoots (40% -- highest min among bed crops)
notes.max_moisture_from: lambs-ear (50% -- lowest max among bed crops)

plants.yaml_output:
# Plant Monitor for Bed B
plant:
  havn_bed_b:
    sensors:
      moisture: sensor.havn_bed_b_moisture
      temperature: sensor.havn_bed_b_temperature
    min_moisture: 40
    max_moisture: 50
    min_temperature: 0
